title: Testimonials | Brown Immigration Law
content:
Our Clients Say It Best
It has been a great pleasure working with Brown Immigration for the past 4 years. Attorney Russell and her team, including Noelle, were very helpful, I always get a prompt response to my emails within 48 hours, they are very knowledgeable and courteous as well. I will definitely use Brown Immigration again in the future!
Jennifer and Attorney Russell and Lugasy helped my husband get his nationalization they made everything easy and clear, and very patient. Very professional know what they are doing and great at it.
Thank you!!
I couldn't be happier with the service I received from Brown Immigration Law. Attorney Kathryn P. Russell and Case Manager Noelle Baker were excellent in helping us get my daughter’s citizenship finalized after she was adopted from Guatemala eighteen years prior. The process was smooth. Communication was excellent. Highly recommend!
Browns immigration is a place to depend for all your immigration needs. My green card application took just two months. Very fast and convenient. Anhelina, as well as Attorney Christina, together with their group are really professional lawyers and they are very knowledgeable about legal issues and have an excellent understanding of every case. I r...
Browns immigration is a place to depend for all your immigration needs. My green card application took just two months. Very fast and convenient. Anhelina, as well as Attorney Christina, together with their group are really professional lawyers and they are very knowledgeable about legal issues and have an excellent understanding of every case. I recommend brown immigration law for everyone. Anhelina, as well as Attorney Christina, are really professionals to work with.
It has been such a pleasure working with Attorney Cuic and Noelle.
Starting from applying for my fiance visa till I received my first green card over the past two years. Both of them are professional (all the steps were clear), patient (they made sure we had what we needed for my immigration matters), and were kind.
Thank you for all your help!
Brown Immigration is the one you want to go with for your immigration matters. Their expertise and creative approaches to problems make them stand out amongst their competitors in this field. I am very grateful to Attorney Anais, Attorney Rishi, and Maritza Zuniga for their unwavering support and their dedication to helping people with immigration ...
Brown Immigration is the one you want to go with for your immigration matters. Their expertise and creative approaches to problems make them stand out amongst their competitors in this field. I am very grateful to Attorney Anais, Attorney Rishi, and Maritza Zuniga for their unwavering support and their dedication to helping people with immigration matters. I did NIW as an engineer and I had a couple of immigration law firms saying that I was not qualified and turned me down, but Rishi and Anais saw it as an opportunity and made it all work seamlessly.
Thank you so much for your support. I am going back home for a vacation after 15 years!
Case manager Jennifer Thurau and Attorney Maya Lugasy has been very helpful and quick in responding to questions that i have. My green card was approved in 5 months. overall great experience with Brown Immigration Law!
Emeline and Attorney Maya guided us through multiple filings, from applying for a marriage-based green card in 2020 to achieving my naturalization in 2024. They were both very friendly, worked promptly on our filings, and were highly responsive via email. When COVID delays impacted my application for employment authorization, they were always avail...
Emeline and Attorney Maya guided us through multiple filings, from applying for a marriage-based green card in 2020 to achieving my naturalization in 2024. They were both very friendly, worked promptly on our filings, and were highly responsive via email. When COVID delays impacted my application for employment authorization, they were always available to talk and did everything possible to expedite the process. We couldn’t be happier with their services.
